metadata.description: UI/screen design skills for Claude Code: 13 atomic theme/critique/refine/copy/mockup/tweaks/flow operators (audit, create, extend, port, bolder, quieter, distill, motion, frontend-design, ux-writing, tweaks, flow, critique). Stack adapters for Flutter and Next.js/Tailwind. Pairs with product-workflow (PM/strategy) — install both for full pipeline.

plugins.name: design-workflow
plugins.description: UI/screen design pipeline — Júri critique (Nielsen 10 + 5dim radar) + theme audit; 11 atomic operators (theme audit/create/extend/port, bolder/quieter/distill, motion, frontend-design, ux-writing, tweaks); flow audit. Foundation orchestration (compose/sequence/ship, status, promote, atlas-save, opus-execute, caveman) lives in product-workflow.
